*** SUPERSEDED by source-truth/ — do not edit AUDIT.txt for new audits. See source-truth/README.md ***

Design audit — MediMotive static site (2026-05-18)

PASS (site-wide)
- No fake logo (text wordmark only)
- No header email CTA
- No contact/request form
- No visible placeholder boxes (empty visual sections hidden via :not(:has(img[src])) and .is-empty)
- Approved color palette unchanged
- Compact nav: Expertise, Case Studies, About, Contact (no Home, no Gallery in header)
- LinkedIn in footer and contact page: https://www.linkedin.com/in/bjoern-seiler-30481b165/
- gallery.html linked from About anchor area, work journey section, and footer Proof only

PASS (about.html structure)
1. Hero — About MediMotive, anchor links (credentials, work journey, full visual profile)
2. Human introduction — portrait live, quote
3. What MediMotive stands for — three cards
4. Career arc — four timeline items
5. Work journey (#work-journey) — four story cards with images when files exist
6. Credentials (#credentials) — “At a glance” list (20 items) + all 20 certificate PDFs as JPG cards in grouped layout (document frames, lightbox)
7. Proof bridge — case studies CTA

PASS (gallery.html credentials)
- Grouped: Process & audit, Regulatory & product safety, Management systems (2+2+3 grid)
- Unified cert-card markup with lightbox (shared app.js)

PASS (gallery.html)
- Credentials & Work Journey page: certificates, work journey, project note → case studies
- No confidential customer logos/drawings in gallery

IMAGE PATHS
- Certificates: assets/images/certificates/bjoern-seiler-*.jpg
- Work journey: assets/images/work-journey/work-*.jpg, bjoern-seiler-*.jpg
- Portrait: assets/images/bjoern-seiler-portrait.jpg
